question_text: Examine the structure of the molecule shown below (CH₃COOH). Which functional group does the highlighted side carry?

answer_key.explanation: The −COOH group of ethanoic acid is the carboxylic-acid functional group.

visual.caption: Structural formula of an organic compound.
visual.altText: Two-dimensional structural depiction of a four-atom organic molecule built around carbon, with bonds to additional oxygen and hydrogen positions.
